## Definition

**Macronutrients** is introduced in this chapter, situated within a broader discussion of the organization of matter. Matter is defined as anything that occupies space and has mass, encompassing all things both living and non-living.

## Core Principles

Classifier signals: section_heading, bolded_define.

Related foundational topics introduced alongside macronutrients include atoms and atomic structure, chemical bonds, chemical reactions, cell structure, and buffers.
